# SAM2 Checkpoints

Place the SAM2.1 tiny checkpoint here:

```text
sam2.1_hiera_tiny.pt
```

The file is ignored by Git. Download it with:

```powershell
powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\laptop_receiver\setup_laptop_env.ps1
```

Primary source:

```text
https://huggingface.co/facebook/sam2.1-hiera-tiny/resolve/main/sam2.1_hiera_tiny.pt
```
